business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property ownership and operations including warehousing, logistics/distribution, manufacturing, and corporate administrative office operations

coverages_discussed.notes: Total Insured Value across 9 locations: Building $146,260,000; Contents $42,495,000; BI $62,590,000

positives: Majority of locations are Non-Combustible or Masonry Non-Combustible/Fire Resistive construction
Most facilities are relatively modern (built 1992-2019, with several post-2010 buildings)
Favorable recent loss history - zero claims reported in 2022, 2023, and 2024 policy years
Diversified portfolio of warehouse, manufacturing, and office occupancies
concerns: LOC-007 (Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2) is not sprinklered
LOC-004 (Dayton Manufacturing Facility) is the oldest building (1992) and is Joisted Masonry construction with manufacturing occupancy
Carrier turnover - three different carriers across the last four policy terms (Hartford, Chubb, Hartford, Liberty Mutual)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Property coverage shows 2 claims with $202,875 paid and $238,554 total incurred. Prior insurance history reflects 1 claim in 2021 and zero claims in 2022, 2023, and 2024 policy years.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio comprises 9 Ohio-based industrial/commercial locations including Rickenbacker Logistics Center Buildings A & B (Columbus), Cleveland Distribution Hub (Brooklyn), Dayton Manufacturing Facility, Cincinnati Cross-Dock Terminal, Toledo Industrial Park Buildings 1 & 2, Akron Flex Space (Uniontown), and a Corporate Administrative Office in Columbus.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Property losses total 2 claims with $202,875 paid and $238,554 incurred. One claim occurred during the 2021 Hartford policy term; no losses reported in 2022, 2023, or 2024.
